name: signature-base

documentation.readme: Signature-Base is the YARA signature and IOC database for our scanners LOKI and THOR Lite
usage_sections: threatintel - Threat Intel API Receiver (MISP, OTX)
misc - Other input files (not IOCs or signatures)
documentation.how_to_use: Clone or install `signature-base` from its upstream repository, then run `signature-base --help` (or the README entrypoint) to confirm flags.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [shell_linux] in the Penetration Testing category. Fits when the engagement needs: [![Build Status](https://travis-ci.org/Neo23x0/signature-base.svg?branch=master)](https://travis-ci.org/Neo23x0/signature-base) [![Active Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/Maintenance%20Level-Actively%20Developed.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: Signature-Base is the YARA signature and IOC database for our scanners LOKI and THOR Lite.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use.

use_cases: When you need Penetration Testing, use signature-base because [![Build Status](https://travis-ci.org/Neo23x0/signature-base.svg?branch=master)](https://travis-ci.org/Neo23x0/signature-base) [![Active Development](https://i.
When chaining Penetration Testing tools, pair signature-base with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `signature-base --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
